achievements.description: Get an enemy to kill another one without you holding a Rocket Launcher, Plasma Rifle, or BFG

achievements.description: Beat all of Level 23 and kill the Cyber Demon using nothing but your Fists

achievements.description: Tear an enemy apart with the Chainsaw

achievements.title: Absolutely, Utterly Overkilled

achievements.description: Kill at least 12 enemies with a single BFG shot

achievements.title: Me and My BFGest Friend

achievements.title: Two Birds with One Stone

achievements.title: Better than Turkey Puncher 3
